creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Grünewald from comment #1)
Michael, Thanks for the quick response. As it turns out, gahr committed this earlier this morning.

I opened this ticket in response to the plan to delete the Tcl/Tk 8.4 ports. I really know nothing about the port. I used to have port that required it and generated the bug report to make sure it was taken care of. I generated several others at the same time for the same reason, so I really am not suited to take over the port.
